title: Blood Effect Balloons 5 pack
description: Product description A gruesome addition to your Halloween Decor, the Blood Effect Balloons create an eerie effect at Halloween parties and events. Ideal for attaching to walls and ceilings, the Blood Effect Balloons will give partygoers and trick-or-treaters a fright during the macabre Halloween period. Safety Warning Warning! Choking hazard. Not suitable for children under 36 months due to small parts choking hazard. Children under 8 can choke or suffocate o uninflated or broken balloons. Adult supervision required. Keep uninflated balloons away from children. Discard broken balloons at once. Keep away from fire, sources of ignition & extreme heat. Contains natural rubber latex.
